name: @pryzm/plugin-door
description: PRYZM 2 — Door plugin (S11). Headless half: Store<DoorData>, typed errors, 6 handlers (CreateDoor / DeleteDoor / MoveDoor / SetDoorType / SetDoorSwing / SetDoorWidth). Cross-store mutation: handlers declare affectedStores: ['door', 'wall'] to keep Wall.openings[] in lock-step. Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/door.ts) emits a BufferGeometryDescriptor with frame + leaf + handle slots. Committer / tool live under src/committer/ — only THREE-touching surface in the plugin.
